'''Chanceller''' or '''Chance''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His horror of the war eventually caused him to [[Desertion|defect]] from his line of duty.

==Biography==
Chanceller was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]<ref name="MZ" /> in [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]].<ref name="Chanceller birth date" /> He began serving with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in [[8 BBY/Legends|8 BBY]], assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']].<ref name="MZ" /> Two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, in [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]], the ''Judicator'' was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] force that [[Raid on Janara III|attacked]] the settlement of [[Sreina]] on [[Janara III]]. Officially, the assault was to uncover rebels living in Sreina, but Chanceller soon learned that there were not rebels present, and the Imperial forces had destroyed an innocent settlement. While touring the ruins of the city, Chanceller came upon a [[Alexandra Winger|young girl]] in the rubble of a destroyed house. Barely conscious, Chanceller rescued her and took her aboard the ''Judicator''. The child survived, but refused to speak, and Chanceller remained with her, appointing himself her unofficial guardian. One of the ''Judicator''{{'s}} officers, [[Senior Lieutenant/Legends|Senior Lieutenant]] Brandei, suggested fostering the girl with friends of his on [[Garos IV]], the Wingers. The [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''Judicator'' agreed, and sent Brandei and Chancellor on ahead with the girl.<ref name="TP" />

On Garos IV, Chanceller stayed with the child in the [[Ariana medical center|medical center]] in [[Ariana]] until her new foster mother, [[Sali Winger]], arrived. She thanked Chanceller for saving the child, and during their conversation Chanceller revealed that Imperial forces had been responsible for the destruction of her home, not Rebels as officially stated. Placing the young girl's hand in Sali's, Chanceller left the room. Several days later, he deserted from the Navy,<ref name="TP" /> unable to serve the institution that had killed thousands of innocents.<ref name="MZ" />

During his stay on Garos IV, Chanceller fell in with the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|underground resistance]]. He was caught in the middle of raid made by the resistance on an Imperial supply convoy. He assisted the underground fighters, and joined them. Chanceller's expertise with weapons and demolitions made him a valuable asset.<ref name="MZ" />

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Chanceller was part of an underground operation to stop shipments of [[Hibridium/Legends|hibridium]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] in transit from the Imperial [[mining center complex]] to the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. During the mission, Winger was compromised as a member of the underground by her classmate, and son of [[Major General]] [[Carner]], [[Lej Carner]]. Chanceller killed Carner to save Winger from exposure and hid the body.<ref name="GH">{{JournalCite|1|A Glimmer of Hope}}</ref>
